title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: Find My Device location permission denial breaks onboarding flow and does not return to Organized screen on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the license/privacy policy when prompted.
3. On the 'Organized' screen, tap 'Find My Device'.
4. When the location permission dialog appears, tap 'Deny'.
5. Observe the resulting screen and behavior.
expected: After denying location permission, the user should be returned to the 'Organized' screen and the Find My Device feature should gracefully indicate that location permission is required to proceed.
